title: How to Collect All Wedding Photos From Guests [2026]
description: 5 proven ways to get your guests' photos. No apps, no lost memories.
author: Guestcam Team
tldr: The easiest way is to create a QR-code album with Guestcam — guests scan and upload directly, no app needed.

content.text: Why do guests (almost) never send their photos?

After the wedding you have the photographer's memories — but what about the 200 phones in the room? In practice, guests share only 5–10% of what they shot. The reason is simple: sending is a chore. Below are 5 ways to fix this — from worst to best.
We compared five approaches. Each has pros and cons:
How do I set up a QR-code gallery in 2 minutes?
The easiest path is via Guestcam. Steps:

items: Go to guestcam.si and click Create gallery (free, no card needed).
Enter the couple's names and the wedding date.
Download the QR code with a personalised design (PDF).
Print cards for every table or for the entrance.
Guests scan with their phone — photos appear live in your private gallery.

content.text: How do I get more photos from guests?
From analysing 500+ weddings we pulled 5 tips that consistently raise participation:

items: Put a QR card on every table — not just at the entrance.
Have the DJ or MC mention the gallery: 'Scan the QR code on your table to share photos.'
Add a personalised line (e.g. 'Ana & Marko — share your memories').
Send the QR link to guests via WhatsApp/SMS the day after the wedding.
Drop the card into the favour bag you hand out on the way out.

content.text: Create a free gallery for your wedding

content.q: Do guests need an app to upload?
content.a: No. They scan the QR code with the phone camera and upload directly via the browser.

content.q: Are the photos kept in full quality?
content.a: Yes. Guestcam keeps original resolution and metadata. WhatsApp by comparison compresses to about 50% quality.

content.q: How many photos can I collect?
content.a: Up to 20 on the free plan. The Premium plan allows unlimited photos.

content.q: Can I see photos live during the wedding?
content.a: Yes. The Premium plan includes Live Gallery — photos update in real time.

content.q: What happens to the gallery after the wedding?
content.a: Content stays available according to your plan — from 30 days (Free) to 1 year (Premium). You download everything as a ZIP.
